breakdown: This PR fixes a bug where non-standard reward keys ('xp'/'gold_pieces') from LLM responses weren't being normalized to standard keys ('xp_gained'/'gold') in the streaming passthrough path. The fix adds fallback logic in `normalize_rewards_box_for_ui` and applies normalization in the UI pair resolution. Test coverage is excellent with a real E2E test. Type safety could be improved with explicit type hints on the normalization function.
key_changes: Enhance normalize_rewards_box_for_ui to fall back to 'xp'/'gold_pieces' if 'xp_gained'/'gold' not present
Remove raw keys after normalization to prevent persistence of non-standard format
Apply normalization to rewards_box in _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair passthrough path
Add E2E test verifying normalization handles messy LLM-generated keys
Refactor some canonical stream logic in world_logic.py for planning block handling
